calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2016 Off Calendar

Status Of Filing Of Receipt For The Purchase Of Annuity For The Benefit Of Minor: Joy Barnes
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2015 Continued To Feb-02-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Minor
Off Calendar Sep-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

Thomas E. Donahue Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Charnesha Cobb, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Joy Barnes present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
The court dismisses DOES 1-50 without prejudice.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $570,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $146,428.98 payable to Law Firm of Donahue & Horrow, LLP
Medical, hospital, ambulance, nursing, and other like expenses payable directly to providers in the amount of: $4,004.96
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment: $177,379.74
A net balance of $392,620.26 for the purchase of an Annuity for the benefit of minor.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Compromise of Pending Action of minor.

Status Hearing Scheduled on January 28, 2016 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the purchase of annuity. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-29-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-24-2015 Set For Case Management Conference On Jun-24-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
